Welcome to Swift Beulah Insurance Agency Ltd

Get reliable & swift insurance for you and your family

COMMITTED TO PROVIDING OUR CUSTOMERS WITH EXCEPTIONAL SERVICE.

At Swift Beulah Insurance  Agency Ltd, we believe that peace of mind comes from knowing you are protected. Our commitment is to offer personalized insurance solutions tailored to safeguard what matters most to you. Backed by a team of dedicated professionals, we provide comprehensive coverage with a promise of professional service, innovative solutions, empathetic understanding, and swift response.

Mercy Gacoki

CEO & Founder
Discover More
Swift Beulah Insurance Agency Ltd

Get reliable & swift insurance for your business

We partner with Individuals, SMEs and corporations to provide comprehensive insurance solutions that complement their financial strategies, ensuring they have a well-rounded protection plan.

  • Motor Insurance – Ensures vehicles, whether personal or corporate fleets, are fully protected with comprehensive or third-party cover.
  • Medical Insurance – Protect clients from the financial burden of medical emergencies with individual, family, or corporate medical covers.
  • Individual Life Insurance – Ensures loved ones are financially secure in case of death.
  • Group Life Cover – Helps businesses offer financial security to employees.
  • Group Credit Life Cover – Shields lenders and borrowers from financial loss due to untimely death or disability.
  • General Insurance – Protects personal and business assets from risks like fire, theft, liability, and property damage.
  • Enhanced Client Protection – Strengthen your financial planning strategies by ensuring you are covered against unexpected risks. 
  • Seamless Integration – My insurance solutions complement your financial plans, offering a holistic wealth protection approach.
  • Customized Policies – Every client is unique; I tailor insurance packages that align with their financial goals.
  • Expert Claims Support – I guide my clients through the claims process, ensuring smooth and fair settlements.
  • Stronger Client Relationships – Offering a full-suite financial security plan builds trust and long-term client loyalty.
what we’re offering

We’re giving all the insurance services to you

Health insurance

Corporate, SME, and individual cover.
Read more

Motor Insurance

Comprehensive and third-party coverage.
Read more

Life insurance

Education and self-development plans.
Read more

General Insurance

All other insurance products.
Read more

Fire Insurance

Provides coverage for damage to buildings, contents, and stocks caused by fire, lightning, or explosion, ensuring financial security.




Burglary Insurance

Protects homes and businesses against theft or forced entry damage to insured property, offering peace of mind and stability.




Marine Insurance

Offers coverage for goods transported by sea, air, or land under Marine Cargo and protects ships or boats against damage under Marine Hull.




Engineering Insurance

Includes Contractors’ All Risk for construction projects, Erection All Risk for machinery installations, Machinery Breakdown for mechanical failures, and Electronic Equipment Insurance for IT and electronic devices.

Liability Insurance

Provides Public Liability coverage for third-party injury or damage claims, Employers’ Liability for employee-related claims, Professional Indemnity for professionals like doctors and lawyers, and Directors & Officers Liability to shield executives from legal claims.

Work Injury Benefits Act (WIBA) Insurance

Ensures employees are covered against workplace injuries, disabilities, and occupational diseases, providing compliance with labor laws and financial security.

Domestic Package Insurance

Protects residential homes against fire, burglary, liability claims, and personal accidents, ensuring homeowners and families remain financially secure.


Personal Accident Insurance

Provides financial compensation in the event of accidental injury, disability, or death, ensuring income protection and peace of mind.



Travel Insurance

Covers medical emergencies, lost luggage, trip cancellations, and other travel risks, ensuring a smooth and worry-free journey for travelers.




Agriculture Insurance

Provides Crop Insurance to cover weather-related losses and Livestock Insurance to protect against loss due to disease, theft, or accidents.




Goods in Transit Insurance

Offers financial protection for goods against damage or loss while being transported, ensuring business continuity and security.



Money Insurance

Covers businesses against financial loss of cash in transit or on-premises due to theft, robbery, or unexpected incidents.




Fidelity Guarantee Insurance

Protects businesses from financial losses caused by employee fraud, dishonesty, or embezzlement, ensuring long-term trust.



Why choose us

Your Protection is our Priority

Professional Service

Our team of experienced advisors is dedicated to guiding you through every step of your insurance journey.

Innovative Solutions

We leverage technology and creativity to design flexible policies that adapt to your unique needs.

Empathetic Understanding

We listen, understand, and craft solutions with your best interests at heart.

Swift Response

In moments of uncertainty, we act quickly to ensure you get the support and assistance you deserve.

Find a local insurance agent

Get Quote
Our testimonials

Read some of our repeat customers feedback

Mercy and her team introduced me to the Swift Beulah Insurance Agency Ltd Life Insurance plan in 2018. At first, I was hesitant, but she patiently explained the benefits. When my policy matured, the payout arrived as promised, allowing me to invest further. Thanks to Mercy, I secured my family’s future and strengthened my financial stability

Christine

After losing my spouse, I had no idea about his insurance, but Mercy from Swift Beulah reached out and guided me through the claim. The process was smooth, and the payout supported my family during a difficult time. I highly recommend Swift Beulah Insurance Agency Ltd for their genuine care and efficiency.
Customer

Kevin

Swift Beulah Insurance Agency Ltd made my claim process stress-free. After an accident, they guided me through each step, ensuring I received my payout quickly. Their professionalism and efficiency are unmatched. I highly recommend their services!


Jessica
